## Summary
What does this PR change, and why?

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature

## Checklist
- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Code is formatted and lints cleanly
- [ ] Tests added or updated where relevant, and the suite passes locally
- [ ] Docs/README updated if behavior or usage changed
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or large binaries are committed

## Notes for reviewers
Anything that needs special attention.
